label: About
title: Get to Know Me
description: Heya! I’m Rora, so called unknown creature from a small village on the hillside. Well, the villager used to call me demon, because my horn but istg I’m not demon at all! Neither an angel nor faerie like those kids called me. It just. I really don’t know what kind of being I am. Kay? And maybe. I would find something abt myself in here
lore: Like I said before. I’m not demon nro angel and else. All I know is one day I woke up and already have a horn like wtf? I can’t figure out anything happened before I woke up, and then my parent moved me into an old house near the village border. Trust me, living in solitaire was boring. But at least I still have internet here.
